turns.text:
Many businesses face huge losses due to the current environment specially those who did not analyse the situation and changing trends before time but some
  businesses who did analysis and rapidly adopted the changes demanded by the situation saved them to face the loss. Other than the pandemic there are multiple challenges that the companies are facing while conducting their operations such as, uncertainty about the future, management of financial issues, inflation, climate change, use of new technologies, new business techniques, competitors in the market, meeting the customer’s requirements criteria, monitoring the business activities and many more.
Like all other business organizations nestle is also working hard in this challenging time to run its business operations successfully. For nestle it is even more difficult because it is a multinational company and operating its business in 189 countries.
Nestle is a well-recognized brand and known as one of the world’s largest food
 and beverages selling company. Nestle is operating its business in 189 different countries with about 352000 employees working in different parts of the world. Nestle deals in selling of 2000 brands of beverages and snack but their main products are ice cream, powder and liquid beverages and pet care products. In spite of this huge setup nestle faced many challenges during this time.
The sales volume and revenues decreased as compared to the previous years and the company suffered loss. Like every business nestle is in difficult position

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
due to the challenges faced during the pandemic and other issues such as inflation, use of new technologies, competitors, and meeting customer requirements. 

To overcome such challenges, companies like Nestle need to adopt new strategies to stay competitive in the market. Firstly, Nestle needs to conduct analysis of the market and changing trends to identify key areas of focus for their business. They should also invest in new technologies and innovative techniques to improve their operations, reduce costs, and improve customer experiences. 

Nestle should also develop contingency plans to minimize the impact of uncertain events and manage their financial issues effectively. They should focus on developing a strong supply chain to ensure the availability of their products to customers. Frequent monitoring of their business activities can help to identify areas of improvement and prevent potential risks. 

In addition, Nestle can focus on expanding their product offerings to cater to a wider range of customers and markets. This can help to balance the effects of market fluctuations and increase revenue streams. They should also prioritize sustainability initiatives and work towards reducing their carbon footprint and contributing positively to the environment. 

In conclusion, Nestle and other businesses should adopt a proactive approach to manage challenges and stay competitive. They need to invest in new technologies, conduct market analysis, develop contingency plans, monitor their operations, expand their products, and prioritize sustainability initiatives. By doing so, they can mitigate risks and sustain their growth in the long run.
